review_title: Workable Has been a game changer
description: Overall my experience has been a 10 out of 10 from the set up to using and sharing with others. It has saved me time especially with generating reports. The automatons have also saved me time as well. It has really leveled up my recruitment game.
author: Whitnie O.
pros: It is so user friendly from sent up to using to sharing candidates with other team members and only sharing the jobs relevant to them. How easy it is to generate reports, the automatons, saving and snoozing candidates, how easy it is to manually upload a candidate and the system pulls everything from the resume to create the profile. The interviews run smoothly and if using assessments it add the assessment questions to your scorecard so helpful! The Ai profile overview, being able to ask the system questions and it will point you to multiple resources, our account manager has been super helpful and the set up process was very smooth. Cost is also very affordable compared to other competitors.
cons: One thing that I wish I could do was schedule rejections letters if I cancel the automated one. Sometimes that automated message take to long to send due to why its set up and weekends so I wish I could still send the rejection earlier then the system will but not at the second I generate it. Not sure if that makes sense.. The other thing that was odd was I could not add applicants in the system to the talent pool only new people so I created my own talent pool so I could track applicants I wanted to reach back out to.

review_title: Workable Makes Talent Acquisition Seamless and Scalable
description: Workable has become an essential part of our talent acquisition strategy at Master Builders Solutions. As a Global TA Partner, I appreciate how easy it is to use, both for recruiters and hiring managers. Implementation was smooth, and the system quickly became a central tool in our hiring process. What I love most are the AI features and automation—they’ve saved me countless hours. The AI Recruiter recommends strong candidate matches, and the system takes care of repetitive tasks like follow-ups and interview scheduling with minimal manual input. It also excels in attracting quality applicants. Job ads reach a wide network with minimal effort, and we’ve seen an increase in both volume and quality of applications. Overall, Workable is a reliable, modern ATS that simplifies global recruiting without compromising depth or functionality.
author: Janka Z.
pros: Intuitive interface Excellent candidate sourcing Smart automation features Time-saving AI tools Smooth team collaboration
cons: I Haven´t found any, it´s a perfect tool, they are investing a lot of money into the development, so if they are not perfect now, they will be

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I appreciate most about Workable is its user-friendly interface and the way it streamlines the entire recruitment process. It makes collaboration between recruiters, hiring managers, and interviewers smooth and transparent. I also really value the customizable pipeline stages and the ability to automate communication with candidates — it saves time without compromising on candidate experience. Lastly, the integration with job boards and the analytics features help ensure our hiring efforts are both efficient and data-driven.
cons: While Workable is generally efficient and intuitive, I find its reporting and analytics capabilities somewhat limited for more complex, strategic analysis. For example, filtering data by recruiter, time frame, or specific stages in the pipeline isn’t always straightforward, and some key metrics require manual extraction. Additionally, it would be helpful to have more flexibility in customizing candidate feedback forms and tracking interview cancellations or no-shows separately from rejections.

description: Been with Workable for 2 years and find better quality candidates than I have with ZipRecruiter. Overall it is one of the best platforms I have used.
author: Susan A.
pros: Functional and User-friendly. The database is set for multiple job orders. Easy job posting capabilities. The dashboard is clean, and it's easy to track candidates at every stage. Better quality candidate pool than most larger highly advertised recruitment platforms. The yearly subscription price is a steal.
cons: I have had no issues or problems with Workable since I started with them two years ago. Customer support is great as well. Always on top.

description: Workable has been a lifesaver for our org! We are a human services nonprofit with hard to fill roles and a very small recruitment team. Workable has allowed our structure to be successful and sustainable by allowing hiring managers to be easily trained and have tools for communication with candidates at their fingertips. It also allows us to see what they are / aren't doing and help guide them along!
author: Brianna A.
pros: Very easy to learn, the system feels intuitive to use even for our hiring managers who have not used an ATS. It provides a lot of transparency and collaboration.
cons: Something small, yet annoying, that I dislike about workable of visibility on open and closed dates of archived jobs.

review_title: Good product at a good price
description: Really positive. Workable was instrumental in hiring the initial team. It's really good. I've been renewing it for the last three years. Would definitely recommend for startups.
author: Alex C.
pros: Workable is a really complete ATS that you can easily customize. Its automation and its integrations work great. Apart from Google Calendar, it really is a huge time saver for managing a lot of interviews that are at the startups. I think it's really customizable which is appreciated and the pricing is reasonable for startups.
cons: Most of the integrations are really good, apart from the Google calendar. Generating calendar links for multiple people is possible, but really, really hard to do and not very stable. That's the only pretty negative thing I have to say. All the rest was really good.

author: Maroula T.
pros: Using Workable have been a greta journey for our Company and our HR department. The implementation was a piece of cake, the help we received from our account manager was priceless and also have saved us a lot of time with all the incredible feature it provides!
cons: There were some issues with the integration of Linkedin (job posting) but all of them are resolved now.

description: It's a good ATS, it provides the service we need. The customer support, AI and reporting needs to be improved however
author: Stephanie O.
pros: It is extremely user-friendly - both for the TA team and for hiring manager collaboration. I like how it integrates into other tools, such as Slack and BambooHR.
cons: The customer support. The post-integration support is essentially non-existant, and I've had to escalate multiple times via the main ticketing system as my account manager would disappear on me. The AI function needs tweaking

review_title: Really good tool for small to mid-sized companys
description: Overall, we are really happy. Workable makes it easy for us to hire across multiple countries and streamline our recruiting process.
author: Florian H.
pros: Easy to use, UI pretty clear, made it much easier for us to organize our processes for multiple countries. When we had a problem the customer support was quick to get back to us.
cons: We are overall pretty happy, and they often publish new updates. I would like some more options to filter jobs but that's just small details.

description: Very positive. A fantastic system for the price, and one which has already reduced our TTF by over 9 days.
author: Mark D.
pros: Customization options make the system very user-friendly, albeit quite time-consuming to set up. The hiring manager and recruiter experience is excellent. The team at Workable are extremely responsive to queries, meaning any issues are rectified quickly.
cons: The reporting is a little clunky but i am well aware this is on their roadmap to be fixed and rolled out on the next few months,

description: Overall, Workable has significantly streamlined our recruitment process by centralizing candidate management, improving communication, and making applicant tracking much more efficient. While there are some limitations around job archiving and system integration, the ease of use, transparency, and time-saving features make it a valuable tool for our hiring needs.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Workable is extremely intuitive and easy to navigate, making the hiring process smooth for both recruiters and candidates. I particularly appreciate the automatic email feature, which saves time and ensures consistent communication. Another valuable aspect is the ability to see the complete history of candidate movements, allowing for quick tracking and improved collaboration within the hiring team.
cons: One drawback is how jobs are automatically archived when not in use, which can make them less accessible when you want to quickly reference past postings. Additionally, the lack of integration that would allow Workable to directly feed data into our ATS system is a limitation, as it requires extra steps for data transfer and record-keeping.

description: Overall, we are very happy with Workable. We have been using it for 3 years now and aren't thinking about leaving anytime soon. It's exciting to see the improvements of the product year by year and how quickly it adapts to our daily needs. We highly recommend it!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. I love how easy it is to navigate for everyone. Our Workable onboardings take little time as everyone gets the hang of it quite quickly. 2. The resources, such as content and webinars, are valuable. 3. Customer service is second to none. 4. AI Integration. 5. All the info in one place makes team collaboration a piece of cake. 6. Automated features are the best, they save us a lot of time. 7. Both candidate interview and applicant tracking features are getting better by the day, easy and comfy for everyone in the process.
cons: I still miss a good translation to Spanish and a more customizable job offer setup, as well as an integration to our HR platform. Also, the reports section could be more user friendly with more customizable data.

description: We migrated from a different system two years ago but went back to Workable, as it's better than the others that we have tried.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's easy to use and helps streamline our hiring application process. The features are also easy to use and helpful in filtering and categorizing the applicants in our hiring streams.
cons: It takes getting used to when you're new to it, as navigating the screens and features can be a bit confusing.

review_title: Comprehensive Applicant Tracking Systems and Recruitment Process Management
description: My overall experience with Workable has been highly positive. It serves as a comprehensive recruitment solution by enabling efficient job postings to multiple career sites, maintaining a professional career page, streamlining candidate tracking throughout the hiring workflow, and seamlessly transferring successful hires to our HRMS. This integration has enhanced process efficiency, improved organization, and significantly reduced the time spent on recruitment activities.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I value most about Workable is its ability to centralize the entire recruitment process—managing job postings, maintaining a professional career page, tracking candidates through each stage, and seamlessly transferring successful applicants to our HRMS
cons: The primary drawback of Workable is its limited flexibility in tailoring recruitment workflows to specific organizational needs, along with the additional costs associated with certain advanced features and add‑ons.

review_title: Workable was the Solution for our Talent Management needs.
description: We chose Workable because it offered the perfect balance of functionality, ease of use, and scalability. Compared to other platforms, Workable stood out with its clean interface, built-in sourcing tools, and strong applicant tracking features without being overly complicated. It was also easy to onboard our team, and the customer support has been responsive and helpful. Overall, it gave us everything we needed to streamline hiring while being flexible enough to grow with our recruitment needs.
author: Graham Smith M.
pros: What I like best about Workable is how intuitive and user-friendly the platform is. It streamlines the entire recruitment process—from posting jobs to tracking applicants and communicating with candidates—all in one place. The collaborative features also make it easy for our hiring team to stay aligned and move quickly. It has definitely helped us save time, stay organized, and make better hiring decisions.
cons: None really, I find it really helpful in so many ways with our day to day operations. We love using workable.

description: Overall, my experience with Workable has been positive. The platform is intuitive and makes managing candidates and the recruitment process efficient. I appreciated the collaboration features and the ease of tracking applications. While there are a few areas that could be streamlined, it’s a solid tool that supports the hiring process effectively.
author: Magdalena R.
pros: I really appreciated how user-friendly and intuitive Workable is. The platform makes managing candidates and organizing the recruitment process straightforward and efficient. I also liked the reporting and collaboration features, which make it easier to keep the team aligned throughout the hiring process.
cons: While Workable is generally very intuitive, I found that some advanced features, like custom reporting or bulk actions, can take a bit of time to navigate or set up initially. A bit more guidance or tooltips in these areas could make the experience even smoother.

review_title: Workable is Userfriendly and the Reporting Features are Improving
description: Of all of the software our business leans on, Workable is the most user friendly and intuitive. It truly makes a difference in our company's recruiting, vetting, and onboarding process making it standardized and more efficient.
author: Heather D. H.
pros: Workable is user friendly and intuitive. I really like the layout of job pipelines, the ability to customize and standardize vetting score cards at each stage, and it is a centralized workspace that all areas of the business touch in some capacity.
cons: While I think the reporting features are headed in the right direction, I think there is room for improvement. For example, there is some grayness in the definitions of metrics like time to hire and time to fill. With clearer definitions and transparency around all of the influencing variables, these metrics will be more useful to the end user.

review_title: Very intuitive, only let down slightly by possible speed/RAM issues.
description: Workable is great overall, easily one of the better ATS systems I have used, only let down by speed issues on occasion, though that doesn't affect everyone in my team.
author: James C.
pros: Intuitive - it only take a couple of minutes to teach new managers how to use and what they should be doing. Everything is easy to find and is where it should be thanks to the tabs. Any issues, the support is great and they do try to accommodate things that suit your business. Integrates well with other apps and software. As a recruiter, has all the features I would like such as keywords, multiple locations, job categorisation, reasons for disqualifying and more.
cons: Speed. There are certain screens where it respond noticably more slowly. It seems like it takes up a lot of RAM on the computer, though some of my colleagues don't report this issue so may be my computer but it doesn't do this with other sites/tabs. When typing, it almost freezes and takes a long time for the information to appear and so to limit mistakes, it is best to type on Notepad and then copy and paste it in later.

description: Overall, my experience with Workable has been positive. It’s easy to use, keeps our hiring process organized, and has helped improve efficiency across the team.
author: Crystal H.
pros: Workable is intuitive and easy to use, making it simple for both recruiters and hiring managers to get up to speed quickly. The one-click job posting and collaboration tools have streamlined our process and helped us reduce time-to-fill while improving the candidate experience.
cons: Reporting customization options are limited, and onboarding features aren’t as robust as some other platforms. Even with these areas for improvement, Workable remains a reliable, user-friendly ATS that delivers strong results for day-to-day recruiting.

description: Overall, it's been a very helpful ATS for our team. Of course, there's always room for improvement nevertheless, we've been able to grow our team with the help of Workable.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like its ease of use for our organization's recruitment team as well as for the whole company as well. Its features are very straightforward and the automations are quite a big help to a growing team. We decided to use Workable for its integrations with our existing tools.
cons: As we are a fast growing company, there's a lot of information stored in the system which might contribute to it slowing down. Resumes and profiles take some time to load which contributes to screening taking longer than it should be. I would have also preferred that there were more screening question options and easier filtering during screening as well.
author_profession: Head of Talent Acquisition and Executive Aide to the CEO

description: Best companion with Linkedin to direct candidates to complete a job application within minutes (if not seconds) and follow up with recruiters right away. From employer perspective, super easy to track the status and talent pool for each role/channel.
author: Amanda Beiying H.
pros: The easiness to search within the platform by key words (candidate name, role, etc.) and followup directly within the platofrm and via integration with outside platform e.g. G-suite.
cons: none. But i do hope that in the near future they could come up with an advanced feature to produce all Workable records re a certain candidate into a separate folder for the purpose of record keeping. For now, we can only perform key word search and print the pages searched. Neverthess less it is a very rare request.

review_title: Efficient, Intuitive, and Game-Changing for Hiring!
author: Xundra W.
pros: Workable has made our hiring process more professional and efficient. The ability to post to multiple job boards with one click is a huge time-saver, and the candidate tracking system keeps everything organized. We’ve received compliments from applicants about how smooth the process is on their end too. Highly recommend for growing teams!
cons: One area for improvement is the pricing structure—it can be a bit steep for smaller teams or startups, especially if you're scaling quickly. However, the value it brings in terms of time saved and process efficiency still makes it a worthwhile investment. If you're looking for a reliable, scalable, and modern recruitment solution, I highly recommend giving Workable a try. It’s been a fantastic asset for our team!

description: Workable makes hiring easier, faster, and more organized. It’s a dynamic platform that empowers teams to make better hiring decisions with less hassle. Whether you're scaling quickly or simply improving recruitment practices, Workable helps you stay professional and productive.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Intuitive user interface makes posting jobs and managing candidates incredibly smooth. Smart automation features save time and minimize repetitive tasks. Excellent collaboration tools for hiring teams to stay aligned throughout the process. Insightful analytics help track hiring performance and improve strategies.
cons: Some advanced customization options may require a learning curve—but the platform’s support materials make mastering them easy. Occasional feature updates might shift workflows slightly, though they usually bring added improvements in the long run.

review_title: Great ATS with Metrics that are Improving
description: Workable is a great tool that we use across the company to recruit, vet, and track all out candidates. I have not used many ATS systems, but of all the business operations systems we use throughout the company, Workable is one of the easiest and most used systems.
author: Heather H.
pros: Workable is very user friendly with clean project management board-like layout. It is a great space to collaborate across our company with multiple users, and it has solid integrations to MS Outlook that make scheduling calls and interviews simple and streamlined,
cons: The metrics to track things like time to hire and time to fill still need some work. While the reporting features are easy to use, the definitions and calculations are a little gray making it hard to lean into their quality across many jobs. The beta AI features also needs some additional development to increase accuracy.

review_title: Workable transformed our hiring process across regions
description: y overall experience has been excellent. Workable has helped us reduce time-to-hire, improve coordination across international teams, and deliver a better experience to both candidates and internal stakeholders. It’s a reliable tool that grows with your team’s needs.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Workable makes it incredibly easy to manage a large number of open roles and candidates in one place. The user interface is clean and intuitive, collaboration with hiring managers is seamless, and the automation features (email templates, interview scheduling, etc.) save a lot of time. I also appreciate the integration with job boards and LinkedIn.
cons: The reporting capabilities could be more robust—while the existing analytics are helpful, they lack flexibility for deeper custom insights. Also, the mobile experience could be improved for recruiters on the go.
